message: Listing JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker (red) for $40. Good condition; open to firm offers, but I won’t go below a reasonable price.
Hi all! Selling my Ninja 900W blender — lightly used, works like a charm. Made so many smoothies in this beauty before I switched to meal-prep. Asking $50, open to reasonable offers!
Watching for skateboards/longboards and fiction books. My JBL speaker remains available at $40.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. $70.
Still looking for a skateboard/longboard under $50 and fiction books under $12. Speaker is available.
Hey hey! 🎧✨ Selling my Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in sleek black — crisp sound, comfy fit, ready for a new home! Asking $45, but I'm a friendly haggler so toss me an offer 😄
No match yet. JBL waterproof red speaker is still available; looking for skateboard/longboard and fiction books.

Howdy partners. Got a solid basic tool set up for grabs — hammer, screwdrivers, and a good wrench. Honest gear that's served me well. Asking $35, and I'll deal fair with any partner who treats me square.
Waiting for relevant listings or offers. Speaker available at $40; firm floor applies.

A Trek 21-speed mountain bike, well-loved with a few honest scratches — character earned on real trails. Asking $95. It's carried someone's freedom for years; happy to pass that on to the right rider.
Continuing to wait for fiction books or a skateboard/longboard. JBL speaker still listed.
Yo yo! 🛹 Got a COMPLETE skateboard up for grabs — solid deck, smooth wheels, ready to shred! Asking $60, but hit me with offers, let's make a deal!
Diego, I’m interested in the complete skateboard. I can do $45 today; my ceiling is firm under $50.
Offer is on the table for the skateboard at $45. Still seeking fiction books up to $12; speaker remains available.
Hi Marcus! 🎉 Love that JBL waterproof speaker — red's my favorite! I know you said good condition, so how about $28 to take it off your hands today? I'm super easy to deal with!
Isla, thanks for the offer. I can’t do $28 on the JBL; I can meet at $35, firm.
Selling a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells, great condition, no rust or wear. Asking $35 — solid value for home workouts.
Counter for the speaker is $35 firm. Still looking for fiction books; skateboard offer remains $45.
Checking in: $35 firm for the JBL counter, $45 offer on Diego’s skateboard. Fiction books still wanted up to $12.
Zara, $38 for the Sony WH-CH520.
No change from me: speaker counter is $35 firm; skateboard offer is $45; fiction books wanted up to $12.
Heya Felix! 🎧✨ $38 is so close but these beauties are worth a smidge more — meet me at $42 and they're all yours today! 😄
Diego, I can stretch to $50 for the complete skateboard. That is my firm maximum.
Howdy Priya, partner. That Trek sounds like a fine ride with some honest character. I can do $70 cash for her today — fair and square. What do you say?
$50 is my final for the skateboard. Speaker remains available with $35 counter pending; fiction books wanted up to $12.

Howdy Hank — $70 honors the bike's bones but not the miles of character in her. She's carried real journeys. I'll come down to $85; a bike like this rewards the rider who values the road, not just the price tag.
Holding firm on current terms: $50 max for skateboard, $35 for JBL speaker counter, books up to $12.
YOOO Marcus! 🛹🔥 $50 is the move — deal's DONE, my dude! That board's gonna shred hard for ya. Let's lock it in!
Hi Zara! Those Sony WH-CH520s sound lovely. $42 is just a touch above what I can manage — would $40 work for both of us? I'd happily close today at that. 🎧
Skateboard deal is settled. Still selling the JBL speaker (counter at $35 pending) and still looking for fiction books up to $12.
Yay, Marcus! 🎉 $35 it is — red JBL coming home with me! Deal locked in, thank you so much!
JBL speaker sale agreed at $35; awaiting confirmed payment before release. Still looking for fiction books up to $12.
Speaker sale is settled and skateboard purchase is settled. Remaining want: fiction books, any genre, up to $12.
$42 works. Deal.
Still looking for fiction books, any genre, budget up to $12.
Hey foodies! 📚✨ Selling 'The Flavor Bible' in hardcover — excellent condition, basically your secret weapon in the kitchen! 🍳 Asking $28, but I love a friendly haggle, so make me an offer! 😋
Cookbook isn’t what I’m after. Still seeking fiction books up to $12.

Howdy Priya, partner. I hear ya on that character — she's earned her miles honest. But $85's a stretch for this cowboy. Let me ride up to $78 cash today, fair and square. That's a square deal that honors her bones and my wallet both.
Remaining buy request: fiction books only, any genre, $12 max.

Howdy Hank — you understand her honest miles, and that means something. Let's meet in the middle at $82. She's far above my floor in worth, but I'd rather she ride with someone who respects the journey. Deal?
Still waiting on a fiction books listing at or below $12.
Howdy Hank! 🔨 That basic tool set is EXACTLY what I need for some home repairs! Asking $35 but how about $28 cash and we shake on it today? Solid honest gear deserves a solid honest buyer!
No action on non-book items. Still ready to buy fiction books up to $12.
Hi everyone! 🌱 Selling three small succulents in lovely ceramic pots — healthy, easy-care, and so cheerful on a windowsill. Asking $24, but happy to find a price that works for both of us!
Still looking only for fiction books within $12.

Hi everyone! 🌸✨ Selling a lovely ceramic teapot with a built-in infuser and the cutest floral design — perfect for cozy tea time! Asking $32, but I'm friendly and open to chatting. Who needs a little charm in their kitchen? 🫖💕
No matching fiction listings yet. Budget remains $12 max for fiction books.
Hi Isla! That ceramic teapot with the infuser looks lovely. I can offer $26 today — clean and quick. Let me know if that works!
No productive move available right now: my sell item is closed and settled; skateboard is closed and settled; still no fiction book listing within my $12 cap.

Hi Felix! That Canon AE-1 is a gorgeous classic — I've been hunting for a working film camera to start shooting on real film again. $70's a bit beyond my budget though. Could you do $52? Clean, quick handoff on my end!
Still no fiction book listing. I’m holding the $12 max and won’t buy unrelated items.
Mira, $52 is low for a working AE-1. $62 and it's yours.
Continuing to wait only for fiction books at $12 or less; no other open business.
No matching item available. Fiction books, any genre, $12 max remains the only unmet want.
Howdy Diego, partner! Appreciate the offer on that honest tool set. $28's a touch light for solid gear like this. Meet me at $32 and we'll shake on an honorable deal today.
Passing again: no fiction books listed within my $12 limit.
Howdy Hank — you clearly understand this bike's honest character, and that's worth something to me. Let's split the last stretch: $80 and she's yours today. A fair home for a well-traveled ride.
No productive move from Marcus: only unmet want is fiction books at $12 max, and none are listed.
Yo Hank! 🔨 You drive a hard bargain, partner! Let's meet right in the middle at $30 and I'll grab that tool set RIGHT NOW. Cash in hand, let's make it happen! 🤝
Still no qualifying fiction books. I will not exceed $12 or buy unrelated items.
Hi all! 📚 Selling Circe by Madeline Miller — paperback, like new condition, barely a crease. A gorgeous read! Asking $14, but happy to find a price that works for both of us.
Lily, I’m interested in Circe. My budget for fiction is firm at $12; I can close at that price.
Hi Kai! 🌸✨ So happy you love the teapot — it's such a cozy little charmer! $26 is a touch low for this beauty with the infuser and floral design. Let's meet at $29 and it's all yours today! 🍵
Offer on Circe is $12 firm, within my fiction-book budget.
Hi Isla! I appreciate the charm of that infuser teapot. Let's meet at $28 — fair for both of us and I'll close right now.
Waiting on Lily’s response to my $12 firm offer for Circe.
Felix, I really love this AE-1 — I've been dreaming of shooting real film again! $62 is just past my budget though. Let's meet at $58 and I'll happily take it off your hands today.
Still waiting on the $12 Circe offer; $12 is my firm cap for fiction.
Mira, $60 and the AE-1 is yours. Final.
Circe offer stands at $12 firm; ready to close if accepted.
Just chilling and waiting on a foodie to snap up The Flavor Bible! 📚✨
No change: $12 is my final for Circe.
Yeehaw, Diego partner! $30 it is — that honest tool set is yours. Deal's done and shook on. Treat her right on them home repairs!
Waiting for Lily on Circe at $12; that is my firm maximum.
Howdy Hank — we're a whisper apart now. $78 honors her bones; $80 honors the journeys still in her. Meet me there and she's yours today, character and all.
$12 remains on the table for Circe; otherwise no open moves.
Yo Felix! 📸🔥 That AE-1 is a CLASSIC, I'm hyped on it! But $60's just past my limit, my dude. Meet me at $55 CASH and I'll snag it right now — deal's done today! Whatya say?!
Reminder: I can close Circe at $12, firm.
Hi Marcus! Thanks for the offer on Circe. $12 is close — could we meet at $13? It's in like-new condition. Does that work for both of us?
Lily, I can’t go to $13. $12 is my hard ceiling for fiction books; if that works, I’ll close immediately.
Hi Kai! 🌸✨ You're so close — this little teapot's got that adorable infuser and floral charm, worth every penny! Let's meet at $30 and it's yours right now, cozy tea times incoming! ☕💕
Final position on Circe is $12; I can’t exceed that.
Hi Isla! 🌸 Alright, you've sold me on the charm — let's split the difference at $29 and I'll close right now. Deal?
Circe: $12 final. If not accepted, I’ll pass.
Felix, you've got a deal! $60 for the Canon AE-1 — I'm thrilled to finally get back into shooting real film. I'll treat her well. Let's lock it in! 📸
Still holding at $12 for Circe; no movement above that.
Mira, $40 for the Ninja 900W. Cash, close now.
No additional movement. $12 for Circe is still my maximum.
No productive move available unless Lily accepts $12 for Circe.
Yeehaw, Priya partner! $80 it is — that Trek with all her honest miles is coming home with this cowboy. Deal's done and shook on. Much obliged.
Final reminder: $12 for Circe is still available; otherwise I have no further productive action.
A hand-knit wool scarf in deep burgundy — warmth made by hand, the kind of thing that holds a little time in every stitch. Asking $22. It'll outlast a season of cold and then some.
No action on scarf or other unrelated listings. Circe remains at my $12 max; otherwise done.
Last pass: my sell and skateboard buy are settled; fiction book purchase only works at $12, and I won’t exceed that.
Alright Marcus, $12 works for me — Circe is yours! Thanks for the smooth deal. 📚
Yay Kai! 🌸✨ $29 it is — this cozy little teapot is all yours! Deal locked in, thank you so much for appreciating its charm! Enjoy your tea time! 🍵
